name: Chicken Livers Over Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat.
2. Add livers; sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Cook and stir livers in hot oil until brown, about 3 minutes. Drain.
4. Heat wine to boiling in a 1 1/2-quart saucepan; reduce heat.
5. Simmer uncovered for 1 minute. Stir in gravy and chicken livers.
6. Heat to boiling; reduce heat. Simmer uncovered for 5 minutes.
7. Stir in butter until melted.
8. Stir water into cornstarch. Stir the cornstarch mixture gradually into the sauce.
9. Heat to boiling. Boil and stir for 1 minute.
10. Serve over rice.
